title: Oil falls as focus returns to economic slowdown
section_path: Oil falls as focus returns to economic slowdown
section_path_text: Oil falls as focus returns to economic slowdown
summary:
Main
By Daniel Hynes
Further weak economic data saw fears of an economic slowdown weighing on sentiment in commodity markets. A stronger USD also impacted investor appetite. Crude oil extended losses after US consumer spending fell in May for the first time this year.
